description.content: Operations on Spanner databases
Lists Cloud Spanner databases.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Create a database

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Create a database

description.content: Creates a new Cloud Spanner database and starts preparing it to begin serving.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Get a database

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Get a database

description.content: Gets the state of a Cloud Spanner database.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Drop a database

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Drop a database

description.content: Drops (deletes) a Cloud Spanner database.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations on Spanner instances
Lists all instances in the given project.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Create an instance

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Create an instance

description.content: Creates an instance and begins preparing it to be used.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Get an instance

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Get an instance

description.content: Gets information about a particular instance.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Update an instance

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Update an instance

description.content: Updates an instance, and begins allocating or releasing resources as requested.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Delete an instance

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Delete an instance

description.content: Deletes an instance. Immediately upon completion of the request, the instance and all its databases are deleted.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations on database sessions

item.name: Google Cloud Spanner Create a session

request.name: Google Cloud Spanner Create a session

description.content: Creates a new session to be used for requests made with the Spanner API.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The Cloud Spanner API provides programmatic access to Google Cloud Spanner, a globally distributed, strongly consistent relational database service. It enables management of instances, databases, sessions, and execution of SQL queries and DML statements with full ACID transaction support.
